communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am stating the purpose of this request so that you may assist me as required by California Government Code (“Gov”) § 7922.600(a)(1). The purpose of this California Public Records Act request is to determine the existence or non-existence of a specific record.

Please note that I am not requesting the record itself, only confirmation of its existence or non-existence. Thus, Civil Code § 1798.90.55, law enforcement exemptions, the public interest exemption or any other laws or exemptions do not apply to, and are not relevant to, this request.

Please confirm the existence or non-existence of the following Flock Safety ALPR footage record:

License Plate: WCD6448 Texas
Date: March 23, 2026
Time Frame: 12:15 PM - 12:25 PM
Camera Location: In front of 721 Main St 
Camera Lat/long: 36.91475626255013, -121.76127468374297

Please keep in mind your agency’s obligations under the law require you to:

- Respond within 10 calendar days.

- Help me to make a focused and effective request by (1) identifying records and information that are responsive, (2) describing the information technology and physical location in which the records exist and (3) providing suggestions for overcoming any practical issues.

- Broadly construe all provisions that further the public’s right of access, and apply any limitations on access as narrowly as possible, per Article 1, Section 3(b)(2) of the California Constitution.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

David Moore

title: Economic Development Incentives for Hadrian Automation, Inc. (Department of Revenue)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Alabama Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

(1)	Any and all applications, contracts, or authorizations of economic development/tax incentives, tax credits, or grants for Hadrian Automation, Inc., AE Industrial Partners, LP, and/or Rocket Shoals, LLC. These may include but are not limited to a Growing Alabama credit, an investment credit, and an Industrial Development Grant under the State Industrial Development Authority.
(2)	Any and all applications, contracts, or authorizations of economic development grants for Colbert County. These may include but are not limited to a Shoals Economic Development Fund (SEDF) grant.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

André Natta, a citizen of Alabama, in coordination with Julia Gledhill.
